Package neqsim.process.safety.cfd

Class CfdSourceTermCase.Builder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.cfd.CfdSourceTermCase.Builder
Enclosing class:
CfdSourceTermCase
public static final class CfdSourceTermCase.Builder extends Object
Builder for CFD source-term cases.
